issue_description: Reported total_ghg_emissions (97800) does not equal scope_1 (19800) + scope_2_location_based (15200) + scope_3 (48200) = 83200. Variance of 14600 tCO2e.
water_recycled_reused (14200) exceeds total_water_withdrawal (178000) - no error. Recheck: prior flag was incorrectly raised. Cleared.
waste_diverted_from_landfill (41600) exceeds total_waste_generated (44200). Diversion rate of 94% is plausible but total waste figure may be understated. Confirm source data.
air_quality_control_measures = No but no explanation or remediation plan provided. Flag for reviewer attention.
Air quality control measures absent for second consecutive year. Escalation required.
board_level_esg_oversight = No and no ESG policy document provided. Submission is incomplete.
board_level_esg_oversight = No with no document reference. ESG oversight gap identified.
cybersecurity_policy_in_place = No and no document reference. Cybersecurity gap identified for forestry company.
confirmed_cases_of_corruption = 1. Reviewer must confirm investigation status and outcome before approval.
total_fatalities = 1 in 2023. Evidence of corrective action plan required. Review WHS policy implementation.
total_fatalities = 2 in 2023. Two fatalities in reporting period. Mandatory escalation and corrective action review.
total_fatalities = 2 in 2023. Two fatalities in ground operations. Safety investigation evidence required.
total_fatalities = 1 in 2024. Continued fatality rate in aviation ground operations. Escalate to investment committee.
renewable_energy_consumption (52000 MWh) exceeds total_energy_consumption (58000 MWh). Difference is within plausible range for renewable energy company with net exports but confirm methodology.
Scope 1 emissions increased from 18200 (2023) to 19800 (2024), a rise of 8.8% despite stated reduction strategy. Investigate cause.
Cyber incidents increased from 3 (2023) to 4 (2024). Cybersecurity policy effectiveness to be reviewed.
Total GHG reduced 7.6% YoY (103300 to 95400). Validate against fleet modernisation milestones.
TRIFR increased from 8.4 (2023) to 7.6 (2024) - minor improvement. However absolute incident numbers remain high for workforce size.
Company has not commenced submission for 2024 cycle. All fields are blank. Reminder issued.
All 2024 figures are Estimated. Data system migration cited. Total emissions confidence = Estimated. Requires full resubmission with measured data.
air_quality_control_measures = No for financial services company. Acceptable given office-only operations but confirm.
Female leadership representation increased from 33% to 35% - modest improvement. On track but below portfolio average.
Scope 1 decreased from 88400 to 82000 (-7.2%). Positive trend but absolute level remains highest in portfolio.
Scope 3 is Estimated for forestry company. Significant supply chain and land-use emissions likely underreported.
